config.name: phase2_hybrid
config.description: Phase 2: Hybrid search with RRF fusion

per_question_metrics.question: Who was the President of Croatia that offered to fund the construction of the new synagogue at the site of the former synagogue in 1994?
What was the publication date of the Norsk krigsleksikon 1940-1945?
What date did the CDAAA publish the document "No Legal Bar Seen to Transfer of Destroyers"?
per_question_metrics.source_article: Committee to Defend America by Aiding the Allies

per_question_metrics.question: Who was the commander of the 1st Infantry Battalion in May 1943?
per_question_metrics.source_article: 1st Czechoslovak Army Corps in the Soviet Union

per_question_metrics.question: Compare the number of ships sunk by the Morosini and the Giuseppe Finzi during their operations.
What was the name of the plan ordered by Hitler on December 14, 1939, for the preliminary planning of an invasion of Norway?
Compare the strategies employed by the Jews in the ghetto liquidation on December 12, 1942, with those used during the initial aktion on August 19, 1942, in terms of resistance and preparedness.
Analyze the timeline from the order of U-1109 to its commissioning. How might the construction and launching delays have impacted the German submarine strategy in 1944?
How did the treatment of prisoners by Japanese forces during the Bataan Death March influence the health conditions of the prisoners upon arrival at the San Fernando railhead?
Who edited the Biuletyn Informacyjny during the World War II period?
How did the availability of the 15 cm Schnelladekanone L/40 influence the design and deployment of the 15 cm Kanone in Eisenbahnlafette (15 cm K (E)) during World War II?

How did the role of entertainment provided by BFBS Live Events/CSE to British troops in Afghanistan differ from the entertainment provided by the United Services Organization (USO) to American troops?
When was the Prize Act 1939 formally repealed in India and Burma?
How many years passed between the initial television adaptation of the novel and the release of the 2001 film?
per_question_metrics.source_article: As Far as My Feet Will Carry Me

per_question_metrics.question: How does the symbolism of the monument's design elements, such as the colours and the shattered forest motif, reflect the historical context and the intended commemoration of the Warsaw Ghetto victims?
How did Italy's approach to acquiring Tunisia compare to its acquisition of Assab Bay in terms of international support and method of acquisition?
How did the Allied strategies differ between the Battle of Dakar and the Battle of Gabon in terms of achieving control over French territories?
per_question_metrics.source_article: French West Africa in World War II

per_question_metrics.question: How would you compare the resistance offered by the 1515 Grenadier-Regiment ' Stössel ' at fort Déroulède to the overall German strategy of delaying US troops near Metz?
Compare the initial British advance to Hamburg by the 7th Armoured Division and the 15th (Scottish) Infantry Division in terms of their objectives and the areas they targeted.
How did the European Confederation draft aim to handle the potential nationalism of countries projected to be annexed by Greater Germany?

How did the internal rivalries within the Japanese military, particularly between the Chōshū-dominated Army and the Satsuma-dominated Navy, compare to the political divisions within the Navy over the Washington Naval Treaty of 1923?
Analyze the strategic significance of the U.S. oil embargo on Japan in August 1941 and how it might have influenced Japan's decision to attack Pearl Harbor in December 1941
per_question_metrics.source_article: Events preceding World War II in Asia

per_question_metrics.question: How long did Singapore maintain sterling area exchange controls after the British government's decision in June 1972?
Compare and contrast the professional roles Arrigo Petacco held at La Nazione and Il Lavoro during his journalism career.

Compare the types of vessels involved in the Battle of Dakar. Which category (battleship, light cruiser, destroyer, escort/patrol boat, auxiliary cruiser, merchant ship, or submarine) had the most vessels represented?
Who was the Emperor of Japan during the events of 1868, specifically during the Battle of Toba–Fushimi?
When did the March of the Living take place in relation to the October 7, 2023 Hamas attack on Israel?
Which two Muslim Generals defended West Suiyuan in 1940?
How did the Estonian SS Volunteer Brigade's role differ in northern Belarus compared to its actions on the front line near Nevel in late October 1943?

How did the limited funding in the 1930s affect the development timeline of the 240 mm howitzer M1, and what strategic implications could this delay have had on the U.S. Army's preparedness for World War II?
How effective would Battery Moltke have been in defending Jersey from an Allied amphibious assault, considering the armaments and their intended use?
Which naval officer was in command of Task Group 38.2 during the South China Sea raid in January 1945?
What was the relationship between Winston Churchill and Admiral Pound in the context of the British occupation of the Faroe Islands in April 1940?
per_question_metrics.source_article: British occupation of the Faroe Islands

per_question_metrics.question: In which country was Adrian Heath born?
Which department of the Institut für Sexualwissenschaft offered marital counseling services?

How did the strategic decisions made by Roosevelt in his 'Arsenal of Democracy' speech influence the dynamics of World War II, particularly in relation to the balance of power between the Axis and Allied forces up to the invasion of the Soviet Union?
What year did Tanya visit Natalia in her village?
How did the mountings of the 25 mm Hotchkiss anti-aircraft gun models differ between the original model intended for Romania and the model designed for naval and static defense use?
Who was the primary leader of the 1943–1945 Barzani revolt?
Who served as the President of the House of Councillors throughout the entire year of 1965?

Considering Francis Perrin's overestimation of the 'average number of neutrons produced per fission' value for natural uranium, how might this have impacted the practical feasibility of developing an atomic bomb at that time, given the technology and resources available?
How many years did the radio war between the Axis and Allied radio stations last, starting from when Radio Bari began its broadcasts?

Analyze the potential reasons behind the abolition of the Military Medal of Honor during the Allied Occupation of Japan and discuss how the post-war Constitution of Japan further influenced its future prospects.
